name: multiplai-context
description: Context routing, continuous learning, session awareness, and memory management for Claude Code.

workspace_dir.title: Workspace Root
workspace_dir.description: Workspace root. When set, memory/diary/now/learnings default to $workspace_dir/.multiplai/{...}. Falls back to ~/.multiplai/ if unset. Specific *_dir overrides win over this.

memory_dir.title: Memory Directory
memory_dir.description: Directory for memory files (me.md, technical-pref.md, preferences.md). Defaults to <workspace_dir>/.multiplai/memory if workspace_dir is set, else ~/.multiplai/memory.

diary_dir.title: Diary Directory
diary_dir.description: Directory for diary entries and session logs. Defaults to <workspace_dir>/.multiplai/diary if workspace_dir is set, else ~/.multiplai/diary.

now_dir.title: Now Directory
now_dir.description: Per-project status (now-files) directory written by synthesize_now. Defaults to <workspace_dir>/.multiplai/now if workspace_dir is set, else ~/.multiplai/now.

learnings_dir.title: Learnings Directory
learnings_dir.description: Per-day structured learnings directory written by extract_learnings. Defaults to <workspace_dir>/.multiplai/learnings if workspace_dir is set, else ~/.multiplai/learnings.

data_dir.title: Runtime Data Directory
data_dir.description: Runtime state directory for logs, catalogs, and dream state. Defaults to <workspace_dir>/.multiplai/data if workspace_dir is set, else ~/.multiplai/data. Not CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA — runtime state stays with the workspace.

anthropic_api_key.title: Anthropic API Key
anthropic_api_key.description: Anthropic API key for fallback when Agent SDK is unavailable

catalog_model.title: Catalog Model
catalog_model.description: Model to use for LLM-based catalog generation calls

catalog_model_diary.title: Catalog Model (Diary)
catalog_model_diary.description: Override model for diary catalog generation (volume optimization). Empty = inherit catalog_model.

catalog_ttl_hours.title: Catalog TTL (Hours)
catalog_ttl_hours.description: Hours a generated catalog remains valid before being considered stale

diary_catalog_days.title: Diary Catalog Days
diary_catalog_days.description: Number of days of diary history the diary catalog generator processes

enable_skills.title: Enable Skills Catalog
enable_skills.description: Whether the skills catalog generator runs during catalog generation

skills_dir.title: Skills Directory
skills_dir.description: Directory to scan for skills when enable_skills is true

enable_resources.title: Enable Resources Catalog
enable_resources.description: Whether the resources catalog generator runs during catalog generation

resources_dir.title: Resources Directory
resources_dir.description: Directory to scan for resources when enable_resources is true

resources_retrieval.title: Resources Retrieval Backend
resources_retrieval.description: How resources are retrieved when enable_resources is true: 'catalog' (catalog + router, the default) or 'qmd' (hybrid BM25+vector search via a qmd index over resources_dir; see README → qmd retrieval for host prerequisites).

qmd_mode.title: qmd Execution Mode
qmd_mode.description: Where qmd runs when resources_retrieval is 'qmd': 'http' (POST an authored typed query to a resident 'qmd mcp --http' daemon on the host — preferred: warm models, no per-prompt cold start, qmd does the fusion+rerank), 'local' (qmd on PATH — native installs), or 'ssh' (qmd on the host over the container→host SSH bridge).

qmd_http_url.title: qmd HTTP Daemon URL
qmd_http_url.description: Base URL of the 'qmd mcp --http' daemon for qmd_mode 'http'. The daemon must bind 0.0.0.0 (not localhost) to be reachable from the container. POSTs to <url>/query. SECURITY: binding 0.0.0.0 exposes an UNAUTHENTICATED read-only HTTP endpoint over the entire indexed corpus to every device on the LAN unless scoped. On macOS, scope :8181 to the container subnet with a pf/firewall rule — see README → 'Exposure of the http daemon' for a concrete pf example.

qmd_collection.title: qmd Collection
qmd_collection.description: qmd collection name holding the resources index.

qmd_strategy.title: qmd Search Strategy (local/ssh only)
qmd_strategy.description: Ignored in 'http' mode (the daemon fuses + reranks). For 'local'/'ssh': 'fused' (vsearch + BM25 merged by reciprocal rank, ~1-2s), 'hybrid' (qmd query with expansion + rerank, best quality but slow), or 'fts' (BM25 only, no embeddings needed).

qmd_candidate_limit.title: qmd Candidate Limit (http)
qmd_candidate_limit.description: How many candidate docs the daemon reranks per query in 'http' mode. The main latency dial (rerank time is linear: ~0.58s/doc). 10 is a good default. The HTTP request timeout scales with this dial (max(10s, 3 + 0.7s/doc)), so raising it also lengthens the worst-case wait per prompt. Capped at 50 (a bounded worst-case wait of ~38s).

qmd_min_score.title: qmd Minimum Score
qmd_min_score.description: Drop retrieved results scoring below this (0–1) rather than inject weak matches. Applies to all qmd modes.

memory_router.title: Memory Router
memory_router.description: Routing strategy for context selection: 'token_overlap' (offline, fast) or 'llm' (semantic match, one model call per prompt). 'embeddings' is reserved for a future port.

router_model.title: Router Model (llm strategy)
router_model.description: Model used by the 'llm' memory_router. Defaults to Haiku — routing is a cheap classification, so the smallest/fastest model keeps the per-prompt hook latency tolerable. Ignored under 'token_overlap'.

recommend_cooldown_turns.title: Re-recommendation Cooldown (Turns)
recommend_cooldown_turns.description: After a file is injected, suppress re-recommending it for this many turns (it's already in the conversation). Reset on context compaction. 0 disables the cooldown.

keep_ratio.title: Memory Relevance Cutoff (keep_ratio)
keep_ratio.description: token_overlap router: keep a memory file only if it scores at least this fraction of the top match (0-1). Higher = stricter (fewer, more-relevant files, less 10-file cap saturation); lower admits more of the weaker tail. Default 0.30. Ignored under the 'llm' strategy.

enable_costs.title: Enable Cost Collection
enable_costs.description: When on, session start fires a detached, flock-guarded collector that prices Claude Code session transcripts into a local monthly cost ledger (queryable via /multiplai-context:costs). Local-only; nothing leaves the machine. Incremental after the first backfill.

memory_conflict_preamble.title: Memory Conflict Surfacing
memory_conflict_preamble.description: Render a conflict-surfacing directive plus per-file last-updated stamps above every injected MEMORY block, making the model flag memory-vs-session disagreements to the user. Costs ~90 tokens per memory-carrying turn; turn off to save them.
